plugins.name: mam
plugins.description: Multi-Agent Methodology - session-based Architect/Implementor workflow with persistent state, structured sprint artifacts, and bus-based crossover with PDT

plugins.name: mama
plugins.description: Multi-Agent Methodology with Agents - team-based workflow with direct user interaction, persistent working knowledge, and bus-based crossover with PDT

plugins.name: pdt
plugins.description: Product Design Thinking - Socratic design partner for pre-implementation product thinking, concept development, documentation crystallization, and bus-based crossover with MAM/MAMA

plugins.name: bus
plugins.description: Peer messaging bus - connects PDT, Architect, Implementor, and UX Designer sessions for direct cross-session communication via Claude Code's agent-team mailbox protocol, with chat-mode for lightweight exchanges and consult-mode for durable structured artifacts
